user.title: Set up Podcast Player
user.description: Create the Podcast Player integration. Feeds can be added from the dashboard card and service actions during the HACS alpha.

data.direct_first: Prefer direct podcast URLs for media players

data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often Podcast Player refreshes RSS feeds, in minutes.
data_description.max_episodes_per_feed: How many recent episodes to keep cached per feed. Listening progress is preserved when old cached episodes are trimmed.
data_description.direct_first: Use original podcast audio URLs first. Turn this off to prefer signed Home Assistant proxy URLs when available.
